name: Leather Buckle Belt
description: Slim leather belt with brushed metal buckle in full-grain Italian leather. Designed to complement tailored proportions without drawing attention.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: The belt is functional, not decorative. Slim profile works with Massimo Dutti proportions. Brushed buckle is understated. Italian leather will age and darken.
whyIChooseThis: Over luxury belts: COS' proportions are more refined. Over cheap belts: Italian leather justifies the investment. Over statement belts: This disappears into the outfit.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Black with Massimo Dutti and formal tailoring. Dark brown with everything casual. Brushed buckle with Cartier Santos stainless steel.
whatMakesItTimeless: Italian leather ages beautifully. Brushed buckle is permanent. Slim profile is classic.
whatProblemItSolves: Finding a belt that holds trousers without announcing itself.
whatCouldReplaceIt: Hermès for more prestige. Other COS belts in different leather. But this specific proportion is right.
similarPiecesIWouldProbablyLike: Cartier Santos (same understated quality). Massimo Dutti trousers (same proportion discipline).
alternativeUnder3000: Uniqlo Leather Belt (~₹2,490 at uniqlo.com/in) — same proportions, genuine leather
alternativeUnder10000: Massimo Dutti Leather Belt (~₹3,990 at massimodutti.com/in) — full-grain Italian leather, India availability
premiumAlternative: Hermès Reversible Belt H Buckle (~₹60,000+ at Hermès India boutiques) — the status piece
buyRecommendation: Consider the Massimo Dutti alternative instead — identical quality, fully available in India without import hassle. COS has no India store or India delivery. If ordering COS internationally, combine with other items to offset shipping.
importNote: COS has no India stores and does not ship to India from cos.com. Must use a freight forwarder or buy on a trip abroad.
